Transient Lodging Facilities

Code Reference

C. Inside Buildings
17. Hotels, Apartelles, Dormitories & Other Transient Lodging Facilities
Two percent (2%) or the total number of guest rooms of hotels, apartels, dormitories & other transient lodging facilitiesshall be Accessible Guest Rooms. Accessible Guest Rooms shall have the following accessibility features and facilities:
